reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar para descansar (atrás de la estación de servicio hay una arboleda con mesas espectacular). Playeros muy cordiales y eficientes. El resto podría mejorar.

(Translated by Google)
A great place to relax (behind the gas station there's a lovely grove with picnic tables). The attendants are very friendly and efficient. The rest could be improved.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5X3I2VTRBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy atentos y solidarios

(Translated by Google)
Very attentive and supportive
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5N3IySkxnEAE

reviews.comment:
La experiencia en la confitería fué espantosa. Las mesas grasientas de años, mucha mugre, un asco. Un poco de Cif y ganas. A ponerse las pilas con la limpieza. Como socio del ACÁ me dió vergüenza.

(Translated by Google)
The experience at the bakery was dreadful. The tables were greasy for years, so much grime, it was disgusting. A little Cif and you're ready. Let's get on with the cleaning. As an ACÁ member, I was embarrassed.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5am9mRlNnEAE
